response.justification: While Bogdan is a clearly talented and experienced senior engineer with strong backend and distributed systems skills, his resume shows a complete lack of the executive leadership and team scaling experience required for this CTO role. All of his positions have been as an individual contributor (Senior/Staff Engineer), and there is no evidence of scaling teams, developing senior technical leadership, or managing engineering organizations, which are core responsibilities. His agentic AI experience is very recent and at a contributor level, not the strategic, architectural leadership the role demands.
strengths: Deep technical experience in distributed systems, microservices, and high-volume, low-latency applications.
Demonstrates strong initiative and craftsmanship through extensive open-source projects and community involvement.
Has direct, though junior-level, experience in both fintech (RIDE Capital) and agentic AI infrastructure (re:cinq).
concerns: Complete lack of formal engineering leadership or management experience; all roles are as an individual contributor.
No demonstrated experience scaling an engineering team from 10 to 30+, a hard requirement for the role.
Agentic AI and fintech experience is not at the senior architectural or strategic level required for a CTO.
